mapper.select: select count(*) from notifications where is_read = false
select * from notifications order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select count(*) from notifications where recipient_user_id = #{recipientUserId} and is_read = false
select count(*) from notifications where recipient_user_id = #{recipientUserId} and is_read = false
select * from notifications where type = 'article_published' and target_id = #{articleId} order by id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update notifications set is_read = true, read_at = current_timestamp where is_read = false
mapper.select: select * from notifications where id = #{id} and recipient_user_id = #{recipientUserId}
mapper.update: update notifications set is_read = true, read_at = current_timestamp where recipient_user_id = #{recipientUserId} and is_read = false
mapper.delete: delete from notifications where is_read = true and read_at is not null and read_at < #{threshold}
